summary: This is a brief announcement post where Cathy O'Neil promotes two upcoming speaking engagements. She will be giving a talk at Tufts University on Thursday and participating in a data science education roundtable in Washington D.C. on Friday morning. The D.C. event will be livestreamed and is open to in-person attendance.
key_points: Speaking at Tufts University on Thursday
Participating in a D.C. roundtable on data science postsecondary education on Friday
The D.C. event will be livestreamed for remote viewers
money_quotes: I'll be in D.C. on Friday morning to talk data science education with mucky-mucks.
key_insight: A quick logistical post announcing speaking engagements on data science education.
